memoryArtifacts.headline: History of Gwenwynwyn ap Owain (1165-1216)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog (died c. 1216) was the last major ruler of mid Wales before the 
completion of the Norman English invasion. He was one of few native rulers to represent a real threat to …

zh.Powys Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog於1165年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd37歲，母親Gwenllian ferch Owain35歲。他於1199年之後與Margaret Corbet結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1216年在英國威爾斯波斯潘斯卡斯特爾享年51歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯波斯。

zh-hans.Powys Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog于1165年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾时，他的父亲Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd37岁，母亲Gwenllian ferch Owain35岁。他于1199年之后与Margaret Corbet结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1216年在英国威尔斯波斯潘斯卡斯特爾享年51岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯波斯。

nameMeanings.name: ab
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Eberhard.
Swedish: soldier's name, apparently from ax ‘ear (i.e. the part of a cereal plant which contains its flowers or seeds)’.

variants.name: Akes
meanings: German: possibly a variant of Ax . The surname Akes is virtually non-existing in Germany.

variants.name: Axt
meanings: German: metonymic occupational name for a woodcutter, carpenter, or maker of axes, from Middle High German ackes, axt- ‘axe’.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: O'Callaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Dermot, Donal, Kiernan, Niall, Conor, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Siobhan, Tiernan.
Irish (Cork): from Gaelic Ó Ceallacháin, see Callahan .

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog was born in 1165, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd, was 37 and his mother, Gwenllian ferch Owain, was 35. He married Margaret Corbet after 1199. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1216, in Painscastle, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.Powys Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: Castle, Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog est né en 1165, à Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian ferch Owain, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Corbet après 1199. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1216, à Painscastle, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog 1165 in Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd 37 und seine Mutter Gwenllian ferch Owain 35. Er hat nach 1199 Margaret Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1216 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Painscastle, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog è nato il nel 1165 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian ferch Owain, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Corbet dopo il 1199. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1216, nel Painscastle, Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Powys, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliogが1165年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffuddは37歳，母Gwenllian ferch Owainは35歳であった。1199年以後にMargaret Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1216年にイギリスウェールズポウイスペインスカストルで51歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズポウイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog(이)가 1165년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian ferch Owain(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1199년 이후 Margaret Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1216년 영국 웨일스 파우이스 파인스카스틀에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 파우이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog nasceu em 1165, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian ferch Owain, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Corbet após 1199. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1216, em Painscastle, Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Powys, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog родился в 1165 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian ferch Owain, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Corbet после 1199 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1216 г. в местности пеинскастл, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenwynwyn ab Owain Cyfeiliog nació en 1165, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, su papá, Owain "Cyfeiliog" ap Gruffudd, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Gwenllian ferch Owain, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Margaret Corbet después de 1199. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1216, en Painscastle, Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Powys, Gales, Reino Unido.
